attributes.action: Vote of No Confidence in the current Government from the British public
attributes.additional_details:
Our worry is that by 2029 we won’t recognise this country if Labour are allowed to continue on their current trajectory. 

It will also be too late and near impossible for a new government to turn things around if we wait until 2029.
attributes.background:
MPs are not listening to their constituents, who are fed up with the mismanagement of this once great country.

We, the British public of the four nations, demand the House of Commons to listen to this petition stating we have lost confidence and demand an early General Election.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
